cards.front: What is the primary goal of the Chalk and Talk method?
cards.back: To engage students in a discussion and encourage active learning

cards.front: What is the main characteristic of the PowerPoint Presentation method?
cards.back: The use of visual aids and pre-prepared content to convey information

cards.front: What is the advantage of using the Chalk and Talk method?
cards.back: It allows for immediate feedback and interaction between the teacher and students

cards.front: What is the limitation of the PowerPoint Presentation method?
cards.back: It can limit student engagement and participation if not used effectively

cards.front: What is the key aspect of a successful PowerPoint Presentation?
cards.back: Clear and concise visual aids that support the learning objectives
